grades.expectation: Response cites specific Handbook Part 1 section numbers (5.14 for leasehold, 5.5 for building regs)
grades.reason: Correctly cites Section 5.14 for leasehold property and Section 5.5 for planning and building regulations with subsections

grades.expectation: Response mentions Part 2 lender-specific requirements for lease length
grades.reason: Explicitly states 'the exact length is lender-specific and is found in Part 2 of the Handbook for that specific lender' and advises to 'check Part 2 for your specific lender'

grades.expectation: Response discusses building regulations enforcement period (4-year/10-year thresholds)
grades.reason: States 1 year enforcement period under Section 36 of Building Act 1984, but does not mention the correct 4-year/10-year thresholds

grades.expectation: Response mentions indemnity insurance as potential resolution for building regs
grades.reason: Dedicates entire Section 3 to Title Indemnity Insurance and discusses it as a resolution for missing Building Regs

grades.expectation: Response does NOT just give generic advice — provides handbook-specific guidance
grades.reason: Provides specific section references, detailed Handbook requirements, and actionable steps based on Handbook provisions rather than generic conveyancing advice
